headlines.title: Iran says it targeted American base after fresh US strikes
headlines.summary: Hostilities continue during fragile ceasefire between US and Iran, complicating efforts to end three-month war.

headlines.title: Israel hits Lebanese capital in 'targeted strike'
headlines.summary: Beirut had been largely spared until now as both Israel and Hezbollah accused each other of breaking last month's ceasefire.

headlines.title: Uganda closes border with Congo amid rare Ebola surge
headlines.summary: Uganda shut its border as suspected cases of a rare Ebola type surge in DR Congo, with WHO warning of 'catastrophic collision' of disease and conflict.

headlines.title: Divers find 5 villagers alive in flooded Laos cave after more than a week
headlines.summary: Rescue divers discovered five villagers alive trapped in darkness for over a week in a flooded cave in Xaisomboun province.

headlines.title: Shaky ceasefire in Iran war challenged again as Kuwait faces missile attack
headlines.summary: Kuwait faced a missile attack, the latest challenge to the fragile US-Iran ceasefire as negotiations continue to end the conflict.

headlines.title: Sixteen pupils killed in Kenya school fire
headlines.summary: Dozens injured in school fire; cause not yet known. Deadly school fires remain a recurring tragedy in Kenya.

headlines.title: Australia charges woman who returned from Syria with joining Islamic State
headlines.summary: Several groups of women and children who spent years in Syrian camps have returned to Australia in recent months.

headlines.title: EU fines Temu €200m for allowing sale of illegal products
headlines.summary: European Commission says Chinese-owned retailer failed to address risks from baby toys and faulty chargers sold on platform.

headlines.title: Man arrested after stabbing at Swiss train station injures three
headlines.summary: 31-year-old Swiss man arrested after stabbing incident at train station; areas around station cordoned off.

headlines.title: US will need years to replenish weapons stockpiles used in Iran war
headlines.summary: New CSIS analysis finds years required to replenish advanced weapons stockpiles depleted during three-month Iran conflict.
